metadata.notes: 2013-2017: no transaction data available via ESPN API (confirmed empirically, all weeks error). 2018: league-wide most-dropped only - per-team and sloppy-seconds stats are null this season because WAIVER-type transactions have no team attribution (100% of that season's waiver moves, confirmed 0% broken in every other year 2019-2025). "Same-week adds" are pickups that cannot be ordered against a same-week drop from another team (scoring_period only resolves to the week) - these are excluded from team-level tallies rather than arbitrarily attributed. Top-level keys cover the full season including playoff weeks; "regularSeasonOnly" mirrors the same structure filtered to scoring_period <= that season's reg_season_count.
